hero_subtitle: SFTY helps VASPs orchestrate multiple compliance providers into a unified VARA workflow that preserves audit evidence and tracks jurisdiction-specific regulatory rules.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance workflows slow when providers disconnect
problem_description: Digital asset compliance teams managing VARA obligations face fragmented provider outputs and manual handoffs that delay onboarding and regulatory tasks. This separation creates gaps in risk visibility and weakens audit readiness across jurisdiction-specific workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes fragmented VARA provider results, regulatory rules and review actions into one unified compliance workflow so VASPs can accelerate onboarding, maintain risk visibility and preserve audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From provider checks to VARA compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, applies jurisdiction-specific VARA rules, routes reviews, opens cases, records decisions and preserves audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Structured VARA compliance
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple providers under VARA rules into coordinated workflows, decisions, cases, evidence packages and reporting for streamlined jurisdictional compliance control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing VARA obligations with controlled provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence in enterprise-ready deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VARA compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports VARA compliance by connecting provider outputs into structured workflows aligned with jurisdiction-specific policies, case management, Travel Rule workflows and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate VARA providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates VARA providers by routing checks, alerts and Travel Rule data into connected compliance workflows, cases and decision logs tailored to VARA’s jurisdiction-specific requirements.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by recording decision logs, case histories and regulatory rule changes within a secure operational layer accessible for compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects with your existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening systems, turning their outputs into coordinated workflows without disrupting your current compliance stack.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace VARA compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace VARA compliance providers but aggregates their outputs into structured, auditable workflows to improve operational efficiency and regulatory traceability.
final_title: Connect VARA provider outputs into compliant workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures VARA-specific onboarding, Travel Rule and screening providers into audit-ready cases and evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
